Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.ResourceEvent

Packages that use ResourceEvent
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video Capabilites to handle video resources, layout and rendering. 
 

Uses of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 interface PlayerEvent
          Defines the methods used by Player Events.
 interface RecorderEvent
          Defines the methods used in Recorder events.
 

Uses of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 interface SignalDetectorEvent
          SignalDetectorEvent defines the methods, EventTypes and Qualifiers for SignalDetector Events.
 interface SignalGeneratorEvent
          Defines the EventType used in SignalGenerator Events.
 interface SpeechRecognitionEvent
          Describes the result of a speech recognition.
 

Uses of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 interface MixerEvent
          Defines the events sent by a Mixer
 

Uses of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 interface SdpPortManagerEvent
          An event from a SdpPortManager.
 

Uses of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceEvent in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video
 interface VideoRendererEvent
          The class of events returned by a VideoRenderer.
